messages.message:
Hi Ariel 
Just wanted to check in and see if you had a chance to look through the catalog I sent earlier.
If you already have some preferred models — for the Reformer, Stability Chair, Cadillac, or Spine Corrector — feel free to send them to me anytime.

I’ll prepare the exact wholesale prices and specs for each item to help you compare easily.
Let me know whenever you’re ready — I’m here to help. 
嗨，Ariel 
只是想确认一下你是否有机会查看我之前发送的目录。
如果你已经有了一些偏好的型号——比如 Reformer、Stability Chair、Cadillac 或 Spine Corrector——随时可以发给我。

我会为每件商品准备精确的批发价格和规格，以帮助你轻松比较。 
告诉我你准备好了随时——我在这里帮助你。

Hi, this is Johnny from Hesure Pilates.

We were in touch before about Pilates equipment, and I just wanted to reconnect and see whether you’re still exploring options for your business.

We’ve been working with studio owners, distributors, and equipment resellers on reformer setups recently, so I thought it might be a good time to check back with you.

If you’re still interested, I can help recommend suitable options based on your current plan.

Are you looking mainly for:

你好，我是 Hesure Pilates 的 Johnny。

之前我们曾就普拉提设备有过联系，我想重新联系一下，看看你是否还在为你的商业寻找方案。

最近我们一直在与工作室经营者、分销商和设备经销商合作进行改革器设备的设置，所以我认为现在是回访你的好时机。

如果你仍然感兴趣，我可以根据你目前的计划帮你推荐合适的方案。

您主要是在寻找：
studio setup
工作室设置
resale / distribution
转售/分销
adding a few units to an existing business
为现有企业增加几个单元

stop_point_analysis.what_my_last_push_was:
Hi, this is Johnny from Hesure Pilates.

We were in touch before about Pilates equipment, and I just wanted to reconnect and see whether you’re still exploring options for your business.

We’ve been working with studio owners, distributors, and equipment resellers on reformer setups recently, so I thought it might be a good time to check back with you.

If you’re still interested, I can help recommend suitable options based on your current plan.

Are you looking mainly for:

你好，我是 Hesure Pilates 的 Johnny。

之前我们曾就普拉提设备有过联系，我想重新联系一下，看看你是否还在为你的商业寻找方案。

最近我们一直在与工作室经营者、分销商和设备经销商合作进行改革器设备的设置，所以我认为现在是回访你的好时机。

如果你仍然感兴趣，我可以根据你目前的计划帮你推荐合适的方案。

您主要是在寻找：
studio setup
工作室设置
resale / distribution
转售/分销
adding a few units to an existing business
为现有企业增加几个单元
